## Checklist

- [ ] Post frontmatter includes all required fields (`title`, `description`, `pubDate`, `authors`, `track`)
- [ ] Author ID in `authors` matches a file in `src/content/authors/`
- [ ] Avatar image added to `public/avatars/` (if new author)
- [ ] Cover image added to `src/assets/blogimages/<post-slug>/cover.jpg` (if applicable)
- [ ] Previewed locally with `yarn dev`
